violations.text: The floor by the hot hold line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The grease trap attached to the three bay is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The corners of the kitchen have an have an accumulation of soil residue, dropping, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment must clean and sanitize, all areas of kitchen using appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to have employees trained as Food Safety manager. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Pasta was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated to above 165 degrees. Pasta was only out of temperature for less than 30 minutes. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a bowl. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The steam table was not in good repair. Steam table is leaking water. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
